input.command:
nohup cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 > cloudflared.log 2>&1 &
sleep 5
grep -E "https://.*\.trycloudflare\.com" cloudflared.log | tail -1
nohup cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 > cloudflared.log 2>&1 & sleep 8 && grep -E "https://.*\.trycloudflare\.com" cloudflared.log | tail -1
cat cloudflared.log 2>/dev/null || echo "日志文件不存在"
